articles.title: Hopwood Arms Hosts Annual BBQ for Rugby Teams
articles.excerpt: The Hopwood Arms is set to host its annual BBQ this afternoon, featuring players and staff from both the Men’s and Women’s rugby teams.
articles.content_html:
The Hopwood Arms will hold its annual BBQ this afternoon, welcoming players and staff from both the Men’s and Women’s rugby teams. The event aims to bring together the community and supporters of the teams.

Attendees can expect a lively atmosphere with food and drinks available throughout the afternoon. This gathering provides an opportunity for fans to meet the players and engage with the club.

The BBQ is part of the club's efforts to foster community spirit and support for local rugby. It is expected to draw a good crowd, enhancing local engagement with the sport.

Anyone interested in attending is encouraged to join the festivities at the Hopwood Arms, where the event will take place today.
articles.legal_disclaimer: This article was compiled from identified public sources and may be updated when further verified information becomes available.
articles.right_to_reply: Anyone directly affected may request a correction or right of reply by emailing news@rochdaledaily.co.uk.
